## Pull Request Summary

### PR Title
Example: `QA: Add login validation test cases`

> GitHub automatically generates the PR number after creation.

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] New Test Case
- [ ] Test Case Update
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Framework Enhancement
- [ ] Report Enhancement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation Update

---

## Module / Feature Tested

- [ ] Login
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] User Management
- [ ] Course Management
- [ ] Assessment
- [ ] Reports
- [ ] Other: 

---

## Test Coverage

Mention the scenarios covered in this PR.

Example:

- Verified valid login functionality
- Verified invalid login error message
- Verified dashboard navigation after login

---

## Execution Details

| Item | Details |
|---|---|
| Framework | Playwright + Cucumber BDD + TypeScript |
| Browser | Chromium |
| Environment | QA |
| Execution Type | Smoke / Regression |
| Command Used | `npm test` |

---

## Test Result

- [ ] Passed
- [ ] Failed
- [ ] Partially Passed
- [ ] Not Executed

---

## Evidence

Attach screenshots, report screenshots, or logs if applicable.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Feature file is updated
- [ ] Step definitions are implemented
- [ ] Page Object methods are reusable
- [ ] No hardcoded test data
- [ ] Tests executed locally
- [ ] HTML report generated successfully
- [ ] No unwanted console logs
- [ ] PR is ready for review
